kxml_pretraining: ⟁ glyph prefix on every tool call record for K'uhul semantic alignment

base_toolcall_small.description: GPT-2 Small fine-tuned tool-call router. Detects intent → emits structured <tool_call> JSON. Routes to domain micronauts via micronaut_dispatch.
base_toolcall_small.training_status: partial — loss stuck at 10.8 (uniform). LayerNorm backward aliasing bug. Fix: separate dgamma/dbeta entry points in iGPU trainer.
base_toolcall_small.recommended_upgrade: GPT2-Small with fixed backward pass, 2000 steps on train.refined.jsonl

base_toolcall_medium.description: GPT-2 Medium tool-call model. Larger capacity for complex multi-step tool chains. 355M params.
base_toolcall_medium.training_status: s0500 checkpoint. Loss trend: 3.50–4.00 plateau. Needs more data diversity.
base_toolcall_medium.loss_plateau_note: Medium model plateaus at 3.5–4.0 — may need GPT2-Large for complex tool chains
tools: ALL — full supernaut surface + dxsk_* + svg_world_* + geodesic routing

math_micronaut.description: Math specialist micronaut. Routes math_tool calls. Handles algebra, calculus, linear algebra, statistics. Uses python math via tool_call when symbolic reasoning needed.
math_micronaut.training_status: s1500 reached. Loss plateau ~3.5 on medium. UPGRADE RECOMMENDED.
math_micronaut.upgrade_recommendation: GPT2-Large (774M) — medium too greedy for math reasoning. Target loss < 2.0.
math_micronaut.math_via_python: math_tool can emit shell_run({python -c 'import math; ...'}) for numeric computation via KXML chaining

coder_micronaut.description: Coding specialist micronaut. Routes coder_tool calls. Handles code generation, debugging, refactoring across Python/JS/C++/PowerShell/Bash.
coder_micronaut.training_status: dx11 variant trained. Needs KXML tool-call wrapping + PowerShell retry cycles.
coder_micronaut.upgrade_recommendation: GPT2-Large for complex multi-file coding tasks.

powershell_retry_protocol.description: When shell_run emits a PS error pattern, model must cycle through alternatives
error_patterns: is not recognized as the name of a cmdlet
retry_strategy: 2. If bash equivalent exists: emit shell_run with bash command
3. If python equivalent exists: emit shell_run with python -c '...'
4. If PS-only: rewrite cmdlet with correct parameter binding
5. Max 3 retry cycles before emitting error_response

base_instruct_small.description: GPT-2 Small instruction-following base. Not yet tool-call tuned. Used as starting checkpoint for domain fine-tunes.
base_instruct_small.training_status: Fixed version resolves shape mismatch. Use as base for domain FT runs.

geodesic_weights.description: Precomputed geodesic embedding cache for GPT-2 vocab sphere (50257 tokens). Used by dxsk_route for MoE expert selection via arc-bias mesh.
geodesic_weights.usage: Load into DXSK native runtime as bias overlay on attention weights. Also used by math_micronaut for token routing in MathML domain.

upgrade_plan.note: GPT2-Medium plateaus at 3.5–4.0 for math and code — capacity ceiling hit.
upgrade_plan.math_large: Train GPT2-Large (774M) on KXML+MathML+physics JSONL. Target loss < 2.0.
upgrade_plan.coder_large: Train GPT2-Large on tokens_coder_gpu.bin (137MB). Target loss < 1.5.

suggested_config.model: gpt2-large (via HuggingFace or existing medium as init)
suggested_config.token_file: tokens_coder_gpu.bin or new math JSONL tokenized

tool_call_stack.description: Full execution stack for a tool call through the micronaut system
layers: 1. User prompt → base TC-1/TC-2 model → <tool_call> JSON emitted
2. Tool router parses tool name → dispatches to micronaut (MM-1/CM-1/etc.)
3. Micronaut executes: shell_run / python / kuhul_fold_query / dxsk_*
4. tool_response returned → base model continues generation
5. PS error detected → retry cycle (max 3) → fallback to bash/python
tool_call_stack.kxml_prefix: ⟁ KXML semantic tag prepended to each training record for glyph pretraining alignment
tool_call_stack.execution_language: JSONL + KXML glyph annotations (⟁ markers for fold boundaries)
